mapper.select:
/* adm-master-storexct-sql-oracle.xml - selectStorexctCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_STORE A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_STOREXCT B ON A.STOREKEY = B.STOREKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICGR C ON B.ICGRPKEY = C.ICGRPKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW OW ON A.OWKEY = OW.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON B.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TT_MST_STOREXCT TMST ON B.CTKEY = TMST.CTKEY AND B.STOREKEY = TMST.STORE_KEY AND B.RNDKEY = TMST.DCKEY
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* adm-master-storexct-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkStorexct */ SELECT CTKEY ,(SELECT CTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_CT WHERE CTKEY = A.CTKEY) CTNM ,STOREKEY ,(SELECT DISTINCT STORENM FROM TADMIN_MST_STORE WHERE STOREKEY = A.STOREKEY) STORENM ,ARRTIME ,DELYN ,NEWYN ,ARRTIMEAPPLYDATE ,SPCL01YN ,SPCL02YN ,SPCL03YN ,SPCL04YN ,SPCL05YN ,SPCL06YN ,SPCLSTOREYN ,A.SCMCK ,A.SCMURKEY ,A.RNDKEY ,A.ICGRPKEY ,B.ICGRPNM FROM TADMIN_MST_STOREXCT A LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICGR B ON A.ICGRPKEY = B.ICGRPKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND STOREKEY = #{storekey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey}
